name: DataGrid
licenseNote: DataGrid is MUI X (@mui/x-data-grid). fleet-web uses the Premium/Pro tier in places, which requires a valid @mui/x-license key at runtime. Without a valid Cartrack license, DataGrid renders with watermarks/console errors outside the licensed environment.
description: Data grids present sets of records across rows and columns — the primary way operators scan, sort, select, and act on fleet data (vehicles, trips, drivers, alerts). This replaces the old repo's invented 'DataTable' component: fleet-web's real tabular data uses MUI X's DataGrid (columns/rows/getRowId model, sort/filter models, GridApi), not a plain <table>/<tr>/<td> component. IMPORTANT — LICENSE: fleet-web's actual production wrapper (DataGridBase.tsx) is built on DataGridPremium from @mui/x-data-grid-premium, not the free community DataGrid documented as the base here. The Premium/Pro tiers (grouping, aggregation, Excel export, pivoting, row/column pinning beyond the free tier, tree data) require a valid @mui/x-license key at runtime — without it you get watermarks and console errors. This doc/tsx models the free-tier @mui/x-data-grid API, which is the common subset fleet-web's Premium grid extends; anything Premium-only is called out explicitly below.
keyRule: Use DataGrid — not a hand-rolled <table> — for any sortable, filterable, selectable, or large dataset. Pass columns/rows/getRowId; let the grid own sorting/filtering/pagination state via its *Model/on*ModelChange prop pairs rather than re-deriving it yourself.

variants.name: With built-in toolbar (showToolbar)
variants.whenToUse: Almost always — gives quick-filter search, column visibility, filters, density, and export entry points for free. karoo-ui's real wrapper defaults showToolbar to true.

variants.name: checkboxSelection
variants.whenToUse: When users perform bulk actions (assign, export, delete) on multiple records. Pair with rowSelectionModel/onRowSelectionModelChange.

variants.name: pagination
variants.whenToUse: Any dataset beyond a single screen. Client-side by default (paginationMode='client'); set paginationMode='server' + rowCount for server-driven pagination.

variants.name: density="compact" | "comfortable" | "standard"
variants.whenToUse: compact for high-volume operator screens where maximizing visible rows matters; standard is the default.

variants.name: getRowHeight={() => 'auto'}
variants.whenToUse: Rows containing wrapped/multi-line content that shouldn't be clipped to a fixed row height.

variants.name: loading
variants.whenToUse: While a page of data is being fetched — renders a built-in overlay and disables interaction until it resolves.

variants.name: Row actions column (GridActionsColDef)
variants.whenToUse: Secondary per-record actions behind a trailing ⋮ column using MUI X's actions column type + GridActionsCellItem. Never the record's primary action.

variants.name: editMode="row" | "cell"
variants.whenToUse: Inline editing — pair with processRowUpdate. Premium-tier features (grouping, aggregation, pivoting, Excel export, tree data) are NOT modeled here — see licenseNote.

anatomy.name: Toolbar
anatomy.description: built-in via showToolbar — quick filter, column/filter/density controls; replace entirely via slots.toolbar for a fully custom bar.

anatomy.name: Column header
anatomy.description: one per GridColDef; sortable/filterable headers show the relevant affordances and expose aria-sort.

anatomy.name: Selection column
anatomy.description: auto-added leading checkbox column when checkboxSelection is true; header checkbox selects/clears the current page (or all rows, if configured).

anatomy.name: Row
anatomy.description: one record, keyed by getRowId (or the row's own `id` field by default).

anatomy.name: Cell
anatomy.description: one value; rendered via the column's `type` (default column types right-align numbers) or a custom `renderCell`.

anatomy.name: Footer / pagination
anatomy.description: row count + page controls when pagination is enabled; replace via slots.pagination or slots.footer.

anatomy.name: No-rows / no-results overlay
anatomy.description: built-in empty states shown via slots.noRowsOverlay / slots.noResultsOverlay (the latter for zero filtered results).

anatomy.name: Loading overlay
anatomy.description: built-in overlay shown while `loading` is true; replace via slots.loadingOverlay.

behaviors.name: Sorting
behaviors.description: Controlled via `sortModel` + `onSortModelChange` (array of {field, sort}), or leave uncontrolled and let the grid manage its own state internally. `sortingMode` defaults to 'client'; set 'server' to sort server-side.

behaviors.name: Filtering
behaviors.description: Controlled via `filterModel` + `onFilterModelChange`. `filterMode` defaults to 'client'; set 'server' to filter server-side. The built-in toolbar's quick filter is part of the same filterModel.

behaviors.name: Row selection
behaviors.description: `checkboxSelection` adds the selection column; `rowSelectionModel` + `onRowSelectionModelChange` control which rows are selected (an object of shape { type: 'include' | 'exclude', ids: Set<GridRowId> } in this MUI X version — NOT a plain array, which was the pre-v6 API). `disableRowSelectionOnClick` stops row click from also toggling selection.

behaviors.name: Pagination
behaviors.description: Controlled via `paginationModel` ({page, pageSize}) + `onPaginationModelChange`; `pageSizeOptions` configures the page-size picker. `paginationMode='server'` + `rowCount` enables server-driven pagination — fetch the page's slice in onPaginationModelChange and pass it as `rows`.

behaviors.name: Row identity
behaviors.description: `getRowId` returns a stable unique id per row when the row objects don't have an `id` field; keep this function reference-stable across renders (memoize it) to avoid grid state resets.

behaviors.name: Loading
behaviors.description: `loading` shows a built-in overlay (slots.loadingOverlay) and disables interaction while true — this is a different visual treatment than the old DataTable's 'linear bar under the toolbar'; compose a LinearProgress explicitly above the grid if that exact look is required.

behaviors.name: Row/cell editing
behaviors.description: `editMode` ('cell' | 'row') plus `processRowUpdate` enables inline editing; validation and error handling are the caller's responsibility via processRowUpdate's rejection path.

deferred.name: Row grouping / tree data / aggregation / pivoting
deferred.why: Premium-tier (@mui/x-data-grid-premium) features — real in fleet-web's production DataGridBase, but require a valid @mui/x-license key. Not modeled in this free-tier doc/tsx; see licenseNote.

deferred.name: Excel export
deferred.why: Premium-tier feature (GridToolbarExport in fleet-web's Premium build). CSV export is available in the free tier via the built-in toolbar's export button (Community-tier limitation: CSV/print only, no Excel).

deferred.name: Column pinning beyond the free tier's basic pinning
deferred.why: Free-tier DataGrid does support left/right column pinning already — this entry only excludes Premium-specific pinning extensions, if any are added upstream.

states.treatment: 4% on-surface overlay (MUI default), unless disableRowSelectionOnClick + no onRowClick, in which case fleet-web's real wrapper suppresses row hover entirely (not reproduced in this decoupled version — see DataGridBase.tsx).
Neutral grey tint (rgb(91 91 91 / 13.5%), 20.5% on hover) — overrides MUI's default primary-tinted selection to avoid clashing with status-chip colours in dense fleet tables.
Sort icon fades in; cursor pointer.
Sort direction icon fully visible; aria-sort set.
Focus outline suppressed (outline: none) — fleet-web relies on the row/cell hover highlight instead of a focus ring here.
Built-in loading overlay (slots.loadingOverlay); interactions disabled while `loading` is true.
Built-in no-rows overlay (slots.noRowsOverlay); a separate no-results overlay shows when filters/quick-search return zero matches.

specs.value: 52px standard / density-dependent for compact/comfortable (MUI defaults, unoverridden)
semantic.typography.scale.body2 (14px/400) — theme.ts pins MuiDataGrid.styleOverrides.root fontSize to 14px explicitly
rgb(91 91 91 / 13.5%) — a real karoo-ui override, not a tokens.json value; flagged as a gap (no matching semantic token exists for this exact tint)
Wrapped in a MUI Paper with flex/column layout, height:100%, overflow:hidden so the grid fills its container responsively
130px on .MuiDataGrid-main — prevents a real MUI crash when the grid is resized to near-zero height

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions (field, headerName, type, width/flex, sortable, filterable, renderCell, valueGetter, etc.) — keep this array reference-stable between renders (define outside the component or memoize).

props.name: rows
props.description: Records to display. For server-side pagination this is just the current page's slice.

props.name: getRowId
props.description: Returns a stable unique id per row when rows don't have an `id` field. Keep the function reference stable to avoid state resets.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows the built-in loading overlay and disables interaction while true.

props.name: checkboxSelection
props.description: Adds a leading checkbox column for multi-row selection.

props.name: rowSelectionModel
props.description: Current selection, as an include/exclude id-set object (this MUI X version's model — not a plain id array, which was the older API).

props.name: onRowSelectionModelChange
props.description: Called when the selection changes (checkbox toggles, select-all, programmatic changes).

props.name: disableRowSelectionOnClick
props.description: Stops a row click from also toggling that row's selection.

props.name: sortModel
props.description: Array of { field, sort: 'asc' | 'desc' | null }; omit to let the grid manage sort state internally.

props.name: onSortModelChange
props.description: Called when the user changes sort via a column header.

props.name: sortingMode
props.description: Set 'server' to sort server-side; combine with onSortModelChange to refetch.

props.name: filterModel
props.description: Current filter items + logic operator + the toolbar's quickFilterValues.

props.name: onFilterModelChange
props.description: Called when filters (including the quick filter) change.

props.name: filterMode
props.description: Set 'server' to filter server-side.

props.name: pagination
props.description: Enables pagination (present in the type as a literal `true` — omit the prop entirely to disable pagination rather than passing false).

props.name: paginationModel
props.description: Controlled pagination state.

props.name: onPaginationModelChange
props.description: Called on page/page-size change; for server-driven pagination, fetch the new slice here and pass it back as `rows`.

props.name: paginationMode
props.description: Set 'server' + provide `rowCount` for server-driven pagination.

props.name: rowCount
props.description: Total record count — required for accurate page controls when paginationMode is 'server' (rows.length only reflects the current page slice).

props.name: pageSizeOptions
props.description: Options shown in the page-size selector.

props.name: density
props.description: Row/header height preset; compact suits high-volume operator screens.

props.name: getRowHeight
props.description: Per-row height override; return 'auto' to size to content (e.g. wrapped multi-line cells).

props.name: columnHeaderHeight
props.description: Header row height override.

props.name: autoHeight
props.description: Sizes the grid's height to its content instead of filling the container.

props.name: showToolbar
props.default: true (karoo-ui override — this wrapper sets it explicitly)
props.description: Shows the built-in toolbar (quick filter, columns, filters, density, export). Compose slots.toolbar for a fully custom bar instead.

props.name: slots
props.description: Overridable component slots (toolbar, loadingOverlay, noRowsOverlay, noResultsOverlay, pagination, footer, etc.).

props.name: slotProps
props.description: Props forwarded to each slot component.

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Handler for row clicks; not fired from inside an actions-column button by convention.

props.name: editMode
props.description: Enables inline editing at the cell or row granularity.

props.name: processRowUpdate
props.description: Called after an inline edit commits; return the row to persist, or throw/reject to reject the edit.

props.name: apiRef
props.description: Imperative API handle (from useGridApiRef()) for programmatic control — the MUI X convention in place of a plain DOM ref.

props.name: RootPaperProps
props.description: karoo-ui-specific: props forwarded to the wrapping <Paper> container (not a real @mui/x-data-grid prop) — this repo's DataGrid.tsx reproduces that same wrapping pattern.

doThis: Use DataGrid (not a hand-rolled table) for any sortable, filterable, selectable, or large dataset.
Keep `columns` and `getRowId` reference-stable (define outside render or memoize).
Use the *Model/on*ModelChange prop pairs (sortModel, filterModel, paginationModel, rowSelectionModel) rather than re-deriving grid state yourself.
Set `rowCount` whenever paginationMode/sortingMode/filterMode is 'server' — rows.length alone under-reports the total.
Confirm a valid @mui/x-license key is configured before relying on any Premium-tier feature in a real deployment.
dontDoThis: Don't pass a plain array to rowSelectionModel — this MUI X version expects the { type, ids } object shape.
Don't recreate `columns` on every render — it resets column widths/order.
Don't hand-roll export/column-visibility/density controls — the built-in toolbar (showToolbar) already provides them for free.
Don't assume Premium features (grouping, aggregation, Excel export, pivoting, tree data) work without a license key — see licenseNote.
Don't hard-code colours/sizes — use the theme tokens and these specs.
accessibility: Column headers expose aria-sort on the active sort column.
The select-all checkbox announces its indeterminate state when selection is partial.
Rows and controls are keyboard navigable (arrow keys move the active cell); the built-in toolbar's controls are all real buttons/inputs.
`loading` sets an accessible busy state on the grid via the built-in overlay.
Status should never be colour-only within a cell — pair colour with a text value (e.g. a status Chip).

related.name: DatePicker
related.why: MUI X's date filter input inside the DataGrid's filter panel is a date picker field, same license family

related.name: LinearProgress
related.why: Compose above the grid for the classic 'bar under the toolbar' loading look instead of the grid's own loading overlay

related.name: Menu
related.why: Row-actions columns typically open a Menu of secondary per-row actions

related.name: TextField
related.why: The grid's quick-filter search box in the built-in toolbar is a TextField
